stemHtml:
Refer to figure or CAP 697 Figure 4.3.2c and CAP 697 Figure 4.5.3.2 for Pressure Altitude 37 000 ft.
Which changes to forecast conditions will produce the greatest increase in Trip Fuel required for the following Medium Range Jet Transport MRJT flight?

Cruise level: FL370
Cruise speed: Mach 0.74
Trip distance: 2000 NM A change in

options.b: headwind component from 0 kt to 30 kt plus a change in OAT from ISA to ISA +5°C.
options.c: headwind component from 0 kt to 50 kt.
options.d: headwind component from 0 kt to 30 kt plus a change in OAT from ISA to ISA -10°C.
